hero.tagline: Computer Engineering student specializing in Artificial Intelligence. I build web applications with modern technologies and a deep passion for clean, scalable code.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I'm a Computer Engineering student at Università degli Studi "Guglielmo Marconi" specializing in Artificial Intelligence, with a strong passion for software development. I work with both front-end and back-end technologies and manage relational databases.
about.paragraph2: With hands-on experience in enterprise environments — from SAP BTP Cloud development to full-stack Angular/Spring Boot applications — I combine academic knowledge with real-world project delivery. I'm driven by curiosity and constantly evolving my hard and soft skills.
about.paragraph3: I have excellent communication and teamwork skills, a deep understanding of both hardware and software systems, and a commitment to staying current with industry trends. When I'm not coding, I enjoy sports and exploring new technologies.
